source_policy.conflict_rule: books govern reusable method; official/current sources govern current facts; label conflicts explicitly
source_policy.copyright_rule: store paraphrased frameworks, not long source text

update_sources: official AI/security/legal documentation for current facts
Japan privacy/AI governance sources for current legal claims
vendor docs for MCP/A2A/agent tooling changes
Google Cloud official agent/AgentOps docs for implementation-current claims
current Web Vitals / Chrome / web platform docs for performance-current claims

checks: framework traceability checked against TOC/sample pages
web update sources verified if current facts are used
